description_long: This object consists of a set of six swords, each featuring a long, slender blade with a slightly curved profile. The blades vary in design, with some having smooth edges and others featuring pronounced serrations or notches along the spine. The handles are straight and robust, with a rectangular cross-section and a simple, utilitarian design, lacking any visible wrapping or elaborate ornamentation. The coloration is predominantly dark, with the blades showing a metallic sheen and the handles appearing matte and solid. The swords are arranged in parallel, highlighting their differences in blade geometry and length. These weapons evoke the style of modern or stylized katanas or tactical swords, suitable for display or use in urban-themed scenarios.
description: A set of six dark, curved swords with varying blade designs, including smooth and serrated edges, and simple rectangular handles. The blades have a metallic sheen, while the handles are matte and unadorned.
description_view_0: Six swords are shown from an angled side view, clearly displaying the curvature and edge profiles of each blade.
description_view_1: The swords are viewed from above, emphasizing the length, straightness, and the differences in blade edge detailing.
description_view_2: A rear-angled view highlights the back curvature of the blades and the uniformity of the handles.
description_view_3: The swords are seen from the opposite side, again showing the blade curvature and the serrated versus smooth edges.
attribute_blade_type: curved, single-edged, some with serrated spine
